---
title: "Giving GPT-3 a Turing Test"
description: "Which colorless green ideas sleep furiously?"
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-07-18"
categories: [NLP, GPT-3, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Giving GPT-3 a Turing test. Image from [Kevin Lacker](https://lacker.io/ai/2020/07/06/giving-gpt-3-a-turing-test.html).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

"Which colorless green ideas sleep furiously?"

<https://lnkd.in/gvDasA7>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_giving-gpt-3-a-turing-test-activity-6690085912367525888-Ztbm).*
